mapper.select: select id, content_type, source_name, author_name, content_text, like_count, comment_count, audit_status, publish_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from garden_contents where id = #{id} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update garden_contents set content_type = #{contentType}, source_name = #{sourceName}, author_name = #{authorName}, content_text = #{contentText}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
